sections.title: Setup Required (none currently exists)
sections.content:
The project has no testing infrastructure. Before the skeletons below can run, add:

```bash
npm install --save-dev vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom @testing-library/user-event jsdom
```

`vite.config.ts` — add test config:
```ts
test: {
  environment: "jsdom",
  globals: true,
  setupFiles: ["./src/test/setup.ts"],
}
```

`src/test/setup.ts`:
```ts
import "@testing-library/jest-dom";
```

---

Summary of Gaps
sections.content:
| Component | Coverage | Key Gaps |
|---|---|---|
| `Logo` | 0% | `textVisible` prop branch, `className` passthrough |
| `Navbar` | 0% | Mobile toggle state, href generation bug, active-link style |
| `Footer` | 0% | Email validation absent, all link sections |
| `Hero` | 0% | Stats rendering, CTA buttons non-functional |
| `Categories` | 0% | All 6 cards, click handler absent |
| `HowItWorks` | 0% | All 5 steps, step numbers |
| `Features` | 0% | All 4 feature cards |
| `TopWorkers` | 0% | Worker data, Verified badges, buttons non-functional, no loading/error state |
| `CTASection` | 0% | Download button non-functional |
| `App` | 0% | Full page integration, section presence |

**Bugs found along the way:**
- `Navbar`: `link.toLowerCase().replace(" ", "-")` uses string `.replace()` not regex — only replaces the first space in a label. Safe for current nav labels but fragile.
- All CTA/action buttons (`Cari Tukang`, `Lihat Profil`, `Google Play`, `Kirim`) have no `onClick` handlers — dead UI.
- Newsletter form has zero email validation.
- `TopWorkers` data is hardcoded with no loading or error state.
